# The Host Standard

> Professional Airbnb and short-term rental cleaning service in Nairobi, Kenya.

The Host Standard Limited provides subscription-based turnover cleaning for Airbnb and short-term rental hosts in Nairobi. Every clean is carried out by a uniformed two-person team, documented, and photographed.

## Business facts

- Company: The Host Standard Limited
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
- Service areas: Westlands, Kilimani, Lavington, Parklands, Kileleshwa
- Contact: +254798913341 (WhatsApp)
- Website: https://www.thehoststandard.co.ke/

## Pricing (monthly subscriptions)

- 1 Bedroom: KES 15,000/month
- 2 Bedroom: KES 18,000/month
- 3 Bedroom: KES 22,000/month
- Each plan includes up to 20 visits per billing period
- Overage visits billed separately: KES 1,000 (1BR) / KES 1,300 (2BR) / KES 1,600 (3BR)

## What's included

- Checkout cleans: full turnover, bedding always changed, unit staged and photographed
- Maintenance visits: hotel-style housekeeping between checkouts
- 24-hour advance notice before each clean via WhatsApp
- Immediate damage/issue reporting with photos
- Two-person uniformed teams on every visit
- 15-minute photo documentation turnaround

## FAQ

Full FAQ: https://www.thehoststandard.co.ke/#faq
